cooperates.cooperate_desc:
Wombo Combo
When Atlas uses Fatal Bonds, he pull the entire enemy team into a tight circle. This is Vale's perfect moment to drop his full combo.
Tigreal uses ImplosionAtlas he pull the entire enemy team into a tight circle. This is Vale's perfect moment to drop his full combo.
His knock-up ultimate keeps enemies airborne, giving Vale enough time to set his whirlwind and ultimate without the enemies flickering away.i

counters.counter_desc: She is Vale's biggest nightmare. She can immune his knock-up with her first skill, heal through his poke with her passive, and dive him instantly.
His second skill makes him immune to CC (crowd control). He can dash through your whirlwind, kick you out of your tower, and ******** before you can react.

Hanabi have no dashes. 
If she steps too forward,Vale's second skills is almost impossible for them to dodge.
Vale can burst down Zhask's summon (the Spawn) and Zhask himself from a safe distance.
While Estes heals a lot, he forces his team to "clump up" together. A grouped-up team is the perfect target for Vale's massive AoE ultimate.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Early Phase: Poking & Fast Clearing
Skill Priority: Unlock Skill 1 at Level 1 for faster wave clearing.
Laning Precautions: * Stay in the bush to hide your position; this makes it easier to aim your Skill 1 and avoid early ganks.
Since you have high mana usage early, buy one or two Magic Necklaces alongside your boots.
Prioritize clearing your lane within the first 4 minutes before rotating to help Gold or EXP lanes.
Jungler Support: Help your jungler protect their buffs from early invasions, as Mid Lane control creates space for your team to move freely.
Mid Phase: The Ambush King
Rotation: Use your Passive (Windtalk) movement speed stacks to rotate quickly between lanes and participate in team fights to gain even more stacks.
Team Fight Strategy: * Always position yourself behind your front line (Tanks/Fighters).
Use Skill 2 (Knock-up) as your primary setup tool; try to angle it to hit multiple enemies at once.
Don't rush your Ultimate. Wait until enemies are grouped together or locked down by your tank's CC before dropping it for maximum impact.
Late Phase: Precise Bursting
Positioning: At this stage, you are extremely fragile. Stay near your tank and be aware of Assassins (like Hayabusa or Ling) who can dive and burst you down before you react.
Objective Contest: Fight in narrow areas or choke points where your whirlwind and ultimate can cover more ground and trap opponents easily.
Lethal Combo: Use the Skill 2 (CC) \rightarrow Ultimate \rightarrow Skill 1 sequence to instantly eliminate high-priority targets like the enemy Marksman or Mage.

emblems.emblem_desc:
💎Maximum Rotation: Vale is a "roaming" mage. Agility allows you to zip between Mid Lane and Gold Lane to help your teammates, get an assist, and trigger your passive faster.
💎Early Game Lead: Bargain Hunter is vital because Vale is relatively weak until he gets his first two core items. Getting them 5% cheaper can mean the difference between winning or losing the first Turtle fight.
💎The "Burn" Finish: Sometimes an enemy survives your ultimate with 5% HP. Lethal Ignition acts like a mini-Flameshot, automatically striking them with extra damage to ensure they don't walk away

equips.equip_desc:
💎The "Speed" Factor: Between Blood Wings, your Arcane Boots, and your Passive, Vale becomes nearly impossible to catch on the map.
💎Late-Game Scaling: Holy Crystal and Divine Glaive ensure that even if the game goes past 15 minutes, you can still one-shot the enemy Marksman.

hero.hero_overview:
💎Vale is the Windtalker from the Wind Fort. His story is famously linked to Valir (the fire mage). They were childhood friends who made a ten-year pact to meet and settle the rivalry between wind and fire. While Valir represents destructive, chaotic flames, Vale represents the elegant but deadly precision of the storm.


💎Hide in a bush, land your knock-up, and delete anyone who walks by.
hero.hero_strength:
💎Instant Burst: Can "one-shot" squishy heroes (Marksmen/Mages).
💎High Mobility: Passive makes him hard to chase in late game.
💎Teamfight King: Huge AoE (Area of Effect) damage.
hero.hero_weakness:
💎Squishy: Very low HP; easily killed if caught.
💎No Escape: Has no dash or blink skill (reliant on Flicker).
💎Skill Shot Dependent: If you miss your Skill 2, your combo fails.

spell.spell_desc:
💎Ult-flicker:
You can cast your Ultimate and then immediately Flicker to reposition yourself while the animation is playing. This helps you stay safe while your "storm" is doing the work.

dominants.dominant_desc: Go to enemy's purple buff and try to steal it using Flameshot. Go back to your lane and farm. Make sure to rotate on the other lane

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Vale can combine very well with Tigreal. Taking advantage of Tigreal using Ultimate, Vale can use the combo most accurately.

counters.counter_desc: With skill 2 that can knock up, Vale is a good choice to counter Odette by knocking her up to cancel her Ultimate.
Vale is countered by Suyou. Suyou has 2 skills: assassination and escape, so it will be very difficult for Vale to use combo on Suyou.

dominants.dominant_desc: In the early game, you should only exchange skills to get level 2 quickly to gank in Gold lane and return to Mid lane to farm second wave of minions to get Lv3. Then go gank in Exp lane and also teammate in Exp lane to fight for Exp Crab so that both can get Lv4 to prepare for the fight to fight for Turtle.

Like other Mages, Vale will move when he has vision from the Hyper and Roam positions to be able to gank more safely. We should prioritize ganking in the Gold lane so that our MM team can farm comfortably.
In the late game, Vale will move carefully between bushes to attack the enemy's main damage dealers.
A little tip from Vale. His 2nd skill can gain vision around the tornado's stopping point. Use it to check sight and move appropriately at each stage.

emblems.emblem_desc: This Emblem will deal massive damage to enemies, often used on low health main damage dealers to finish them off faster.
This Emblem will deal a decent amount of continuous damage to enemies that can sustain themselves in combat.

equips.equip_desc: With this equipment, Vale can deal a huge amount of damage to the enemy's main units. Lightning Truncheon can be replaced with Sky Piercer If Vale has achieved 2-4 kills and died at least 0-1 times, then he can use Sky Piercer well.

With this equipment, Vale can hold his ground in long fights. With Glowing Wand and Wishing Lantern, Vale can cause trouble for enemies with high health or enemies with high healing abilities but still contributes a lot of damage in combat.

hero.hero_overview: Vale is a hero with the ability to deal massive AOE damage to targets within the skill area.
hero.hero_strength: His power comes in the mid and late game, so make sure to contribute in early game fights to get his power up sooner.
hero.hero_weakness: He is very vulnerable to assassins so move carefully when you don't have enough enemy vision.

You can also use Flameshot to finish off enemies trying to escape combat or to protect yourself from would-be assassins. Purify is also a good choice against enemies with a lot of CC or enemies that can mark us (Karie, Brody, Yuzhong,....)

He will gain his passive by killing or assist

hero.hero_overview: Vale is one of the mages that can burst enemy instantly
hero.hero_strength: His passive can stack 8-10 which is gave him speed movement each stack
hero.hero_weakness: Can died easily if target by an assassin

hero.hero_overview: Vale is a mage hero who is rival with Valir. Vale takes the mid lane and he is good for crowd control and bursting enemies.
hero.hero_strength: Vale ia very powerful mage that could one-hit combo his enemies. With his passive — gaining extra movement speed, when gaining assists and kills, surely enemies will have a hard time chasing and killing him. And that is the major advantage for him — his stealth.
hero.hero_weakness: He can be very stealthy but once stunned and got caught in a combo, potentially be dead because he is just a mage with not so much hp, but it will depend on how you will use the items for him, also using purify to escape from combos and stuns would help his survivability.

data.recommend: Proper building with items and the use of correct battle spell for Vale would make him unstoppable
data.title: Vale Combo
